settings.heading: Important Notice
settings.subheading: Due to the exceptionally busy bank holiday period, our response times are slower than usual. We appreciate your patience.

settings.content: If you can't find answer to your question, contact us by phone at 0800 014 936 or via email at sales@rem-fit.co.uk
Find your questions faster with these quick links for each category

settings.html: Returns and Sleep Trial Order Delivery Mattress Guarantee My Order Refer a Friend

settings.question: COVID-19: Can I still order?
settings.answer: Yes, you can still order and we will deliver your mattress with our contactless delivery service.

settings.question: COVID-19: Are you taking precautions in your warehouse to prevent the spread of COVID-19?
settings.answer: We’re following all government guidelines and have put new measures in place to keep warehouse staff safe, including updated hygiene processes, new shift structures to minimise the number of people working together. We have also introduced a new contactless delivery service for both our 1-person and 2-person delivery services.

settings.question: COVID-19: Can you still remove my old mattress?
settings.answer: Yes, please select this service when placing your order in the checkout page.

settings.question: COVID-19: I'm self-isolating, can I still receive delivery?
settings.answer: Yes, please make us aware prior to delivery and we will adopt our most stringent no-contact delivery service. Should you want to delay your delivery this is fine, simply email or call us with your order number and we'll reschedule accordingly.

settings.question: COVID-19: Can I still return my mattress under the 100-night trial scheme?
settings.answer: Yes, we provide a risk-free sleep trial on all our mattresses. This allows you to sleep on a REM-Fit for 100-nights in the comfort of your own home and really put it to the test! There are no catches. If the mattress, for whatever reason doesn’t live up to your expectations, you can send it back for a full refund. There are no collection charges either! If the mattress isn't 100% right for you simply email us at sales@rem-fit-accounts.co.uk or call 0121 3144264 and we'll arrange the collection for you. Full T&C's available here

settings.heading: COVID-19 questions

settings.question: How do I return smaller items?
settings.answer: Simply email us within 14 days of receiving delivery at sales@rem-fit.co.uk. Please note, items must be in their original packaging and in a new condition. We will arrange a return label and you will have to drop the item off at your local post office. The return delivery cost will be covered by you and reflected in your refund - we will advise you of this cost prior to confirming the return.

settings.question: Why does the mattress need to be in good condition if returning it?
settings.answer: As part of our social and environmental awareness, returned mattresses are either donated to charity and sold on through our partners at the British Heart Foundation or sold on as ‘rejuvenated’ mattresses via various channels and therefore must be clean. *Rejuvenated mattresses are steam cleaned, maintained and if required fitted with a brand-new REM-Fit mattress cover. Rejuvenated mattresses are NEVER sold on as ‘new’ on our website.

settings.question: Will I need the box and plastic packaging if returning the mattress?
settings.answer: No, we want you to get the full experience when trialling the mattress so please discard of all packaging once delivery is received.

settings.question: Do I still qualify for the mattress sleep trial if I decide to finance my order with you?
settings.answer: Yes, of course. If you decide to return the mattress we will refund all instalments you have paid to date and cancel the agreement for you.

settings.question: Can I exchange my REM-Fit mattress for a different REM-Fit mattress?
settings.answer: Yes, you can exchange your first mattress for a different model. Please begin the process via our live chat.

settings.question: My order contained free gifts, what happens to these if I return my mattress?
settings.answer:
In order to receive a full refund when returning your mattress under the sleep trial scheme, please follow the below instructions.

Free gifts must be unused.
Free gifts must be in their original packaging.
Free gifts must be returned - REM-Fit will provide a free collection.

If you have used your free gifts please contact us and we will provide you with a selection of options to consider. Free items T&Cs can be found here

settings.heading: Returns and Sleep Trial Questions

settings.question: I have a finance query
settings.answer: Click here to view our comprehensive finance page.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer:
• *Free 5-10 working day delivery to UK addresses

• 2-Person delivery service | Room of choice

• Old mattress removal - additional extra

• Delivered rolled & bagged for your convenience

settings.question: How are REM-Fit mattresses delivered?
settings.answer: For your convenience we vacuum press and roll our mattresses so that we can deliver them in a convenient and manageable way. This doesn't harm the mattress and ensures the product is well protected during transit.

settings.question: Can you take away my old mattress?
settings.answer: Yes, please select our premium two man delivery service when ordering making sure you check the extra option to collect your old mattress.

settings.question: Do you deliver to room of choice?
settings.answer: Yes, this service is now included as standard at no extra cost.

settings.question: Will I get a time slot for delivery?
settings.answer: Yes, this service is now included as standard at no extra cost. You will receive a narrowed down time window of 3 hours the day before delivery. The drivers will also attempt to call you when approximately 30 minute away.

settings.heading: Order Delivery

settings.question: How long is the mattress guarantee?
settings.answer: We believe in the superior quality of our mattresses, which is why we provide a 15 year guarantee on our mattress models. For full details on our guarantee, please head over to our T&C page here.

settings.question: How do I make a guarantee claim?
settings.answer: If your mattress is covered by our guarantee and you would like to raise a claim, please fill out a claim form here.

settings.heading: Mattress Guarantee

settings.question: How do I edit/update my order?
settings.answer: For any modifications to mattress size, delivery address, contact details, cancellation, or delivery dates, kindly reach out to our customer service team at sales@rem-fit.co.uk after placing your order. Please provide your order number in the subject field.

settings.question: I want to cancel my order, what do I do?
settings.answer: Please contact customer services on sales@rem-fit.co.uk and we will be happy to help you.

settings.question: Can I track my order?
settings.answer: We will provide you tracking information as soon as we dispatch your items for delivery so that you'll know when to expect them.

settings.question: How long can the mattress stay in its packaging?
settings.answer: To ensure maximum comfort, we recommend that the mattress is removed from its packaging and unrolled within 4 months of receiving it.

settings.question: How soon can I use my mattress after unpacking it?
settings.answer: You can sleep on it immediately but it's best to let it rise and reach maximum height which can take 2-3 hours depending on room temperature.

settings.heading: My Order

settings.question: How do I start referring friends to earn £25 each time?
settings.answer: To become a member of our refer a friend programme you must first make a purchase on our website and then sign up to our referral program with Referral Candy

settings.question: Who can I share my referral code with?
settings.answer:
The referral discount code is only to be shared with friends & family.
Our refer a friend programme is not an affiliate programme and sharing the refer a friend discount code on 3rd party websites is not permitted. Sharing the discount code across social media other than through one’s own profile page is also not permitted. Should we have reason to suspect that the refer a friend programme has been abused and not treated within the spirit of the programme we reserve the right to cancel and refuse rewards and repayments.

settings.heading: Refer a Friend
